projects.title: School Website
projects.shortDescription: Responsive school website with news, announcements, and basic admin content management.
projects.fullDescription: A school website designed to provide students and visitors with updated announcements, news, and school information. The system includes a simple admin panel for managing posts and content updates.
features: Responsive design for mobile and desktop

highlights.challenge: Organizing school information in a clear and accessible layout while ensuring easy content updates for administrators.
highlights.solution: Built a database-driven website with an admin panel for posting and managing announcements efficiently.
highlights.impact: Improved accessibility of school updates for students and visitors through a centralized platform.

projects.title: QR Attendance System
projects.shortDescription: Modern attendance tracking system using QR code technology with real-time notifications via email and SMS.
projects.fullDescription: An innovative attendance management solution that leverages QR code technology to streamline the check-in process. The system automatically generates unique QR codes for each session and sends instant notifications to stakeholders when attendance is recorded.
features: Automatic QR code generation for each attendance session
Real-time attendance tracking with timestamp verification
Attendance history with search and filter options
Anti-fraud measures with unique token validation

highlights.challenge: Ensuring accurate and fast attendance recording while preventing duplicate QR scans.
highlights.solution: Implemented unique session-based QR codes with timestamp validation and database verification to prevent duplicate entries.
highlights.impact: Reduced manual attendance checking time and improved accuracy of attendance records.

projects.title: Voting System
projects.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade electronic voting platform with real-time results, comprehensive dashboard, and bank-level security.
projects.fullDescription: A highly secure digital voting platform designed for organizational elections. The system employs multiple layers of security including encryption, two-factor authentication, and blockchain-inspired verification to ensure vote integrity while maintaining voter anonymity.
features: Real-time vote counting and results display
Voter anonymity protection with encrypted ballot storage
Audit trail for transparency and verification
Multiple election support with different voting methods
Vote verification receipts without compromising anonymity

highlights.challenge: Ensuring secure and fair voting while maintaining voter anonymity and preventing duplicate votes.
highlights.solution: Implemented encryption techniques and unique voter validation to secure the voting process and prevent multiple submissions.
highlights.impact: Successfully digitized election process, improving speed of vote counting and reducing manual errors.
